indices.name: index_CompanyInfo_name
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_CompanyInfo_name` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`name`)

entities.createSql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `documentNo` TEXT NOT NULL, `revNumber` INTEGER NOT NULL, `revDate` TEXT NOT NULL, `revReason` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `fileName` TEXT NOT NULL, `filePath` TEXT NOT NULL)

indices.createSql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_DocumentRevision_documentNo` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`documentNo`)

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` (`id` INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT NOT NULL, `documentNo` TEXT NOT NULL, `title` TEXT NOT NULL, `revNo` INTEGER NOT NULL, `revDate` TEXT NOT NULL, `filePath` TEXT NOT NULL, `content` TEXT NOT NULL)

indices.name: index_DocumentSearch_filePath
indices.createSql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `index_DocumentSearch_filePath` ON `${TABLE_NAME}` (`filePath`)

entities.createSql: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `${TABLE_NAME}` USING FTS4(`content` TEXT NOT NULL, tokenize=porter, content=`DocumentSearch`)
contentSyncTriggers: CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ContentSearch_BEFORE_UPDATE BEFORE UPDATE ON `DocumentSearch` BEGIN DELETE FROM `ContentSearch` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END
CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ContentSearch_BEFORE_DELETE BEFORE DELETE ON `DocumentSearch` BEGIN DELETE FROM `ContentSearch` WHERE `docid`=OLD.`rowid`; END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ContentSearch_AFTER_UPDATE AFTER UPDATE ON `DocumentSearch` BEGIN INSERT INTO `ContentSearch`(`docid`, `content`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content`); END

CREATE TRIGGER IF NOT EXISTS room_fts_content_sync_ContentSearch_AFTER_INSERT AFTER INSERT ON `DocumentSearch` BEGIN INSERT INTO `ContentSearch`(`docid`, `content`) VALUES (NEW.`rowid`, NEW.`content`); END
